query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = 'audits' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%ci%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%Profile%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%Sub%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%Obstruction%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2jAyjJtimGfebHK.root --database baLZUhFjyWHEmXFh9Hh7Zt --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = 'audits' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%ci%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%Profile%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%Sub%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%Obstruction%';
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE
cisScore	int
tciScore	int
cisSubMetrics	json
tciObstructionZones	json
tciProfileSamples	json
